title: useOrientation
description: Detects the current device orientation (portrait or landscape) and listens to changes.

body.raw:

`,(0,n.jsx)(r,{name:"use-orientation",code:`"use client";\r
import { useState } from "react";\r
import { useIsomorphicEffect } from "@/hooks/use-isomorphic-effect";\r
\r
export function useOrientation() {\r
  const [orientation, setOrientation] = useState({\r
    angle: 0,\r
    type: "landscape-primary"\r
  });\r
\r
  const handleOrientationChange = (event: Event) => {\r
    const target = event.currentTarget as ScreenOrientation;\r
    setOrientation({\r
      angle: target?.angle || 0,\r
      type: target?.type || "landscape-primary"\r
    });\r
  };\r
\r
  useIsomorphicEffect(() => {\r
    window.screen.orientation?.addEventListener("change", handleOrientationChange);\r
    return () => window.screen.orientation?.removeEventListener("change", handleOrientationChange);\r
  }, []);\r
\r
  return orientation;\r
}`,ext:".ts",repo:"web/hooks/use-orientation.ts"})]})}function u(t={}){let{wrapper:e}=t.components||{};return e?(0,n.jsx)(e,{...t,children:(0,n.jsx)(d,{...t})}):d(t)}function h(t,e){throw new Error("Expected "+(e?"component":"object")+" `"+t+"` to be defined: you likely forgot to import, pass, or provide it.")}return y(O);})();
